purpose: Defines how future snapshots should be checked against forward asset behavior without turning the scanner into a price-prediction signal.
planned_tests: Compare regime labels to 1/5/20 session forward asset behavior.
Compare extreme raw pressure buckets against later movement and max adverse excursion.
Track false positives and false negatives by asset class.
Measure whether score change is more informative than absolute score.
Separate research-pressure alignment from trade-entry timing.
current_limit: The scanner is a public-source pressure terminal. Historical validation is not yet a claim of predictive edge.
